sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114038" key="ximairofo/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐμαιρο-φόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goat-slaying,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:9:774" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.774</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Glauc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
